name: academorix/invitations
purpose: Agnostic invitation substrate — Invitation + InvitationEvent aggregates plus a target registry so any module can add invitable resources.
capabilities: Invitation aggregate with token, target polymorphism, state machine
InvitationTargetRegistry — consumer modules register target types at boot
Delivery, bounce tracking, expiry, resend, rate limits
Not coupled to any specific target or credential provider
when_to_use: Any module needs to send a token-based invitation with acceptance orchestration, bounce tracking, and full audit funnel.
when_not_to_use: For plain transactional notifications with no acceptance flow, use academorix/notifications directly.
